description: Livex Android 3.6.60: Mounts the emergency debug overlay outside the main React root via React Portal, adds an always-visible DBG button with a failsafe quick recovery menu, and implements stacking context audits.
whatsNew: Livex Android 3.6.60: Mounts the emergency debug overlay outside the main React root via React Portal, adds an always-visible DBG button with a failsafe quick recovery menu, and implements stacking context audits.
changelog: Livex Android 3.6.60: Mounts the emergency debug overlay outside the main React root via React Portal, adds an always-visible DBG button with a failsafe quick recovery menu, and implements stacking context audits.
